notes: Interactive ILM sales tool; this file is the data template specification for its Strategy Event scenario engine.
Framework the tool implements; tiering data across storage types by value/access pattern. From cache.

Midline disk modeled as a distinct storage tier in the template alongside online disk and nearline tape.
